description: A carousel post showcasing multiple plated dishes from a single restaurant visit, numbered sequentially to guide viewers through the dining experience and menu offerings.
structural_recipe: Create a 4-8 slide carousel. Slide 1: Restaurant name, location tag, and introductory context (cuisine type, heritage/inspiration). Slides 2+: Individual high-quality photos of each dish ordered, numbered in Arabic numerals (١-, ٢-, etc.), with dish name in Arabic and/or English. Include brief descriptive text about the dish or dining experience. End slide optional: full table view or call-to-action. Use consistent aesthetic, warm lighting, and overhead/angled shots for food clarity.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences engage with visual storytelling of curated dining experiences. Numbered carousel format creates narrative structure that encourages full post viewing (algorithmic benefit). The bilingual Arabic-English naming reflects cosmopolitan Saudi food culture and aspirational dining. Location tagging enables discovery by regional food communities. Sequential narrative mimics the social ritual of sharing meal photos with friends.
transplantation_caveats: Requires high-quality food photography; poor image quality will underperform
Must include proper restaurant attribution and location tagging to avoid appearing as content theft
Arabic numbering and bilingual captions critical for Saudi audience resonance
Works best for upscale/contemporary dining; casual/fast food may underperform with this format
cultural_constraints: Alcohol content must be excluded or obscured
Female staff/servers should be portrayed professionally; avoid objectification
Ensure halal compliance is mentioned if relevant to brand positioning
